stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, if no alternate aerodrome is required, the flight must be conducted so that the expected usable fuel remaining on arrival at the destination aerodrome is not less than…

options.a: fuel to fly 15 minutes at 1500 ft above the destination aerodrome.
options.b: fuel to fly 30 minutes at holding speed and FL100.
options.d: fuel equal to 5% of trip fuel.
